testcase.name: 0180-table-missing-aspect-value-unit-testcase
Table Missing Aspect ValueTestcase - Unit
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case for tables where a row/column lacks a value for a participating unit aspect. This would be be error as per Table Linkbase 1.0 specs. However specification update considered to relax unit aspect from missingAspectValue error.

variation.name: Simple Table, first column on x-axis is missing unit aspect
variation.description: Simple table where the x-axis breakdown has the unit aspect but the first column provides no value.
